quote: Alejandro delivered a complex multi-tenant dashboard on time and under budget. His attention to performance and code quality is exceptional — our Lighthouse score went from 60 to 98.
Working with Alejandro was a pleasure. He communicates clearly, asks the right questions, and always finds elegant solutions. I'd hire him again without hesitation.
Alejo built our entire backend from scratch in 3 months. The APIs are fast, well-documented, and have been running in production with zero incidents for two years.
